signals.headline: Ethereum $4,000 by April End Odds Hit 56% YES on Polymarket After 14% Price Surge | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum $4,000 by April End Odds Hit 56% YES on Polymarket After 14% Price Surge | YES | MED confidence**
